x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Setup Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to establish a credit plan, including repayment terms, schedules, and calculation methods.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Modification Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to change elements of an existing credit plan, such as repayment schedule, installment amount, or interest terms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Activation Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to initiate or make a credit plan effective for execution.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Suspension Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to temporarily pause the execution of the credit plan (e.g., payment holidays).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Resumption Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to restart a previously suspended credit plan.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Restructuring Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to significantly alter the credit plan due to financial or risk considerations (e.g., extending tenor, adjusting installments).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Termination Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to end a credit plan before its scheduled completion.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Settlement Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to fully settle all obligations under the credit plan.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Recalculation Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to recompute repayment amounts, interest, or schedules due to changes in rates or terms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Allocation Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to define or modify how payments are distributed (e.g., between principal, interest, fees).
